nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a high near 69. Southwest wind around 13 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain between 7pm and 11pm, then rain and patchy fog. Cloudy. Low around 41, with temperatures rising to around 49 overnight. West wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
